title: Visitor Pattern
subtitle: Add operations to stable types without modifying them

panels.heading: vs Type Switch
bullets: Small hierarchy → type switch is fine

panels.heading: Key Trap
bullets: Visitor interface too large to maintain
Using Visitor for 2 types and 1 operation

footer: Visitor = easy new ops, hard new types. If types change often, Visitor will hurt. In Go, consider type switch for small hierarchies.
